title: cypholophus stipulatus
intro: Cypholophus stipulatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to New Caledonia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cypholophus stipulatus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Cypholophus stipulatus are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
